rulings.Case Title: ALAN HONNIBALL VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK N.A. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compel Responses To Req For Production Of Docs
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 16, 2012, line 1 - PLAINTIFF ALAN HONNIBALL's Motion tp compel Responses To Request For Production Of Documents. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Discovery Responses is GRANTED. No responses were provided and no opposition filed. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,010. =(501/KT)

rulings.Case Title: FELITA SAMPLE VS. COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 16, 2012, line 2 - DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP, AKIKO WHITE and BARBARA LEAHY's MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADING. Defendants' Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings is DENIED. Camp and Tahoe Keys are distinguishable. September 25, 2012 does not indicate that Court was making findings other than preliminary, i.e. fully adjudicating the case on the merits. =(501/KT)

rulings.Case Title: CINDY OILAR, TRUSTEE OF THE SILVIO L. SCOCCA 1996 VS. ANTHONY BICKEL et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 16, 2012, line 4 - DEFENDANT ANTHONY BICKEL and KATHERINE PARRICK's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Defendant's Special Motion to Strike is continued to November 27, 2012 per ex-parte order. =(501/KT)

rulings.Case Title: REAL EQUITY PARTNERS, LLC VS. BENNY MARTIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 16, 2012, line 4 - DEFENDANT CAITLIN FITTING and BENJAMIN MARTIN's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Granted, subject to opposition. Plaintiff to present substantive opposition and evidence, if any, at the time of the hearing. =(501/KT)

rulings.Case Title: GREEN LANE BUSINESS INVESTMENTS INC. VS. MARTY GUY
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 16, 2012, line 5 - DEFENDANT MARTY GUY's DEMURRER TO COMPLAIN Defendant's Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend to allege compliance with or exemption from San Francisco Rent Ordinance. =(501/KT)

rulings.Case Title: 260 LEE AVENUE, LLC VS. JEANNIE CHAU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Verified Discovery Responses, Documents Production
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 16, 2012, line 6 - PLAINTIFF 260 LEE AVENUE, LLC's Motion For Order Compelling Verified Discovery Responses, Documents Production. Plaintiff's Discovery Motion is granted. No opposition filed. Sanctions in the amount of $335. =(501/KT)

rulings.Case Title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. MARTIN ENG
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 16, 2012, line 7 - DEFENDANT MARTIN ENG's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Defendant's Motion to Quash is GRANTED, subject to opposition. =(501/KT)
